mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_task (type, data, status, user_id, conv_id) VALUES (#{type}, #{data}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{convId})
mapper.update:
UPDATE ai_task
status = #{status},
result = #{result},
tokens = #{tokens},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_task WHERE is_deleted = false
SELECT type as type, COUNT(1) as value FROM ai_task WHERE is_deleted = false GROUP BY type

SELECT COALESCE(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, created_at, updated_at)), 0) FROM ai_task WHERE status = 'success' AND is_deleted = false AND created_at IS NOT NULL AND updated_at IS NOT NULL AND updated_at > created_at
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tokens), 0) FROM ai_task WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COALESCE(SUM(tokens), 0) as value FROM ai_task WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') as weekStart, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') as weekEnd, COALESCE(SUM(tokens), 0) as value FROM ai_task WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{weeks} WEEK) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY weekStart, weekEnd ORDER BY weekStart

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') as yearMonth, COALESCE(SUM(tokens), 0) as value FROM ai_task WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY yearMonth
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ai_task WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(1) as value FROM ai_task WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') as weekStart, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') as weekEnd, COUNT(1) as value FROM ai_task WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{weeks} WEEK) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY weekStart, weekEnd ORDER BY weekStart

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') as yearMonth, COUNT(1) as value FROM ai_task WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY yearMonth
